response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js/React and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Strong background in TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices aligns with the quality-focused responsibilities, though Nest.js and Kotlin/Java experience are not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Current hands-on work with AI agents and MCP code generators directly maps to the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, open source)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work; Java appears only in older robotics/mobile orchestration roles
Cloud platform experience is narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond self-hosted use
